failures.description: The agent misread or misapplied the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the more expensive second item as the cheapest.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The tool output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the tool output because 5339029584 is cheaper. This is not an invalid tool invocation or underspecified intent; the needed evidence was available and the agent reasoned incorrectly from it.
